title: F1 Race Standings Web App

steps.description: Create domain value objects for F1 entities (Driver, Team, Race, Result)
steps.done_condition: All entities implement serializable interfaces and have unit tests

steps.description: Define port interfaces for data access (DriverRepository, RaceRepository)
steps.done_condition: All ports have typed interfaces with no implementation

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for F1 API (fetch driver standings, race results)
steps.done_condition: API client returns mock data matching port interface

steps.description: Implement primary adapter for driver standings component (React functional component)
steps.done_condition: Component renders mock data and handles loading states

steps.description: Create use case for fetching driver standings with pagination
steps.done_condition: Use case returns paginated driver data matching port interface

steps.description: Wire composition root to connect driver standings adapter to use case
Implement integration tests for driver standings flow (API + React)
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass with real API data

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement mock API server with same response structure
riskRegister.risk: API rate limiting affecting test data

riskRegister.mitigation: Break into smaller components during implementation
riskRegister.risk: React component complexity in primary adapter

successCriteria: All F1 data models implemented correctly
API adapter returns valid JSON data
Integration tests pass with real API data
Composition root successfully wires all components
